author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Result: Fixed contiguous() severing the autograd chain. contiguous_t() was creating a new tensor via data_vec()+from_storage without a backward node, silently dropping the grad_fn. Added ContiguousBackward (identity gradient pass-through). Pythia gradcheck now shows 27/27 parameters with gradients (was 15/27). All attn_qkv.w weights across all 12 layers now receive gradients on GPU. Full ferrotorch test suite: 3,254 passed, 0 failed.
